message:
fix: scope process cleanup to Gas Town processes instead of all node processes

findOrphanedClaudeProcesses used 'pgrep -l node' which matched every Node.js
process on the system (VS Code extensions, web servers, etc.). Replace with a
single-pass ps query that filters by known process names (claude, codex, node)
AND verifies the command line references the town root path. Also removes the
per-process isProcessInTown helper since the check is now inline.

Fixes: gt-ewi56

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
